channel.title: Fireball on Alien Truth Social
channel.description: Recent content in Fireball on Alien Truth Social

item.title: Naga Fireballs: Mysterious Glowing Balls in the Mekong River
item.description:
Naga fireballs are a phenomenon observed annually on the Mekong River, where glowing, reddish balls are said to rise from the water and disappear into the air. These fireballs, ranging in size from sparkles to basketballs, are locally attributed to a giant serpent called the phaya nak. While the phenomenon is traditionally linked to the end of Vassa in late October, some observers suggest it may be caused by tracer rounds or flare guns fired from across the river. Scientific explanations have proposed flammable phosphine gas or plasma orbs, but these are debated.

Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Naga_fireball
